headline: Corgi Loaf Baking Co.: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Corgi Loaf Baking Co. is projected #6 of 16 with a 80.86 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Justin Jefferson, Kyle Pitts, and Malik Nabers. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 8, Corgi Loaf Baking Co. traded with Rapid Valley Annihilation and acquired 2026 Round 1 (original roster 2) while sending 2027 Round 1 (original roster 11), 2028 Round 1 (original roster 11). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Jakobi Meyers's 65.6 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 68.2 C-AVI would directly attack the 0.32-point projected gap to Lightskin Legends ✊🏽.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, Ravens Regime traded with Northside Kings and acquired Tyler Warren while sending RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (original roster 2). Tyler Warren is now the current TE starter at 97.2 C-AVI and 90.5 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #6 of 16 at 80.86 lineup C-AVI. Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 is immediately above at 81.18, a gap of 0.32. Ravens Regime is immediately behind at 80.09.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Justin Jefferson (97.3), Kyle Pitts (94.2), and Malik Nabers (84.5).
